profile_name: Agentic 架构与全栈软硬件协同设计

section_labels.agentic_architecture: Agentic 架构 / 自动设计空间探索

recommendations.title: Agentic AI-Driven Microarchitecture Design Space Exploration
recommendations.abstract: An LLM-driven hardware design agent explores cache replacement policy and data prefetcher candidates through cycle-accurate simulation with gem5 for computer architecture discovery.
affiliations: Center for AI-Driven Systems, Example Institute
recommendations.tldr: Problem: This paper studies how an LLM agent can automate microarchitecture design-space exploration. Method: It connects candidate generation, cycle-accurate gem5 simulation, and feedback-guided refinement into a closed loop. Finding: The abstract indicates that the loop can generate evaluable cache replacement and data prefetcher designs. Why it matters: It directly matches agentic architecture, Auto-DSE, and simulator-guided search.

recommendations.title: Compiler Architecture Co-design for RISC-V Custom Accelerators
recommendations.abstract: The method performs full-stack co-design across MLIR, runtime scheduling, workload mapping, and a RISC-V custom extension for a domain-specific accelerator.
affiliations: Systems and Hardware Co-design Group, Example Research Lab
recommendations.tldr: Problem: This paper asks how RISC-V custom accelerators should be co-designed with compilers and runtimes. Method: It places MLIR, runtime scheduling, workload mapping, and ISA extension design inside one optimization path. Finding: The abstract suggests that full-stack coordination can make domain-specific accelerators better aligned with workloads. Why it matters: It matches full-stack hardware/software co-design, compiler-architecture co-design, and domain-specific acceleration.
